articles.title_en: Any ground operation in Iran could have consequences for global security — MFA
articles.lead_en: Russian Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said that Moscow invariably and fundamentally proceeds from the need to resolve the current crisis around Iran through purely diplomatic means

articles.title_en: Russia will respond effectively, harshly to latest EU sanctions package — MFA
articles.lead_en: Maria Zakharova pointed out that European bureaucrats "are no longer able to do anything else," so all they can do is threaten new restrictions

articles.title_en: Kiev makes false promises to Budapest on rights of Hungarians in Ukraine — Russian MFA
